lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: Hello Adventurer. Welcome to Mill Lane Mill. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: I'm Miss Millicent Miller the Miller of Mill Lane Mill. Our family have been milling flour for generations.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a good business to be in. People will always need flour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I mill flour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: This is Mill Lane Mill. Millers of the finest flour in Gielinor, and home to the Miller family for many generations

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: We take grain from the field nearby and mill into flour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I mill flour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I mill flour?

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: Making flour is pretty easy. First of all you need to get some grain. You can pick some from wheat fields. There is one just outside the Mill, but there are many others scattered across Gielinor. Feel free to pick wheat

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: from our field! There always seems to be plenty of wheat there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then I bring my wheat here?

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: Yes, or one of the other mills in Gielinor. They all work the same way. Just take your grain to the top floor of the mill (up two ladders, there are three floors including this one) and then place some grain into the hopper.

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: Then you need to start the grinding process by pulling the hopper lever. You can add more grain, but each time you add grain you have to pull the hopper lever again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where does the flour go then?

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: The flour appears in this room here, you'll need a pot to put the flour into. One pot will hold the flour made by one load of grain

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: And that's it! You now have some pots of finely ground flour of the highest quality. Ideal for making tasty cakes or delicous bread. I'm not a cook so you'll have to ask a cook to find out how to bake things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: Hello Adventurers. Welcome to Mill Lane Mill. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Zanik
lines.text: I'm Zanik of the Dorgeshuun! What is this place?

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: This is Mill Lane Mill. Millers of the finest flour in Gielinor, and home to the Miller family for many generations

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: We take grain from the field nearby and mill into flour.

lines.speaker: Zanik
lines.text: What's flour?

lines.speaker: Millie Miller
lines.text: It's the stuff we get from milling the grain. We use it to make bread and cakes and things.

lines.speaker: Zanik
lines.text: We don't have any of those things in Dorgesh-Kaan! They sound so interesting!
